description: Revel in heavenly comfort with this pair of Camper floaters from fila. Perfect for casual wear around camps, this floater is packed with features that make it a fab buy. Upper Synthetic straps on the forefoot, midfoot and heel with fabric padding Velcro closures on the forefoot and midfoot straps for a customised Fit PU footbed with square grooves and water draining holes on the midfoot for dry comfort in wet conditions Outsole TPR outsole with square grooves throughout and water draining mesh on the midfoot for absolute grip and traction shoe care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust Do not store in direct sunlight
